description:
PgDog is a transaction pooler and logical replication manager that can shard PostgreSQL. Written in Rust, PgDog is fast, secure and can manage hundreds of databases and hundreds of thousands of connections.

pg dog

panels.description: Total number of connected clients.

targets.expr: sum (pgdog_clients) by (instance)

panels.title: Clients Total

panels.description: Clients waiting for a connection from a pool.

targets.expr: sum (pgdog_cl_waiting{host=~"$host", port=~"$port", shard="$shard", role=~"$role", database=~"$database", user=~"$user"}) by (host, port, shard, role, database, user)

panels.title: Clients Waiting

panels.description: Servers currently serving client requests.

targets.expr: sum (pgdog_sv_active{host=~"$host", port=~"$port", shard="$shard", role=~"$role", database=~"$database", user=~"$user"}) by (host, port, shard, role, database, user)

panels.title: Servers Active

panels.description: Servers available for clients to use.

targets.expr: sum (pgdog_sv_idle{host=~"$host", port=~"$port", shard="$shard", role=~"$role", database=~"$database", user=~"$user"}) by (host, port, shard, role, database, user)

panels.title: Servers Idle

panels.description: Servers currently idle in transaction.

targets.expr: sum (pgdog_sv_idle_xact{host=~"$host", port=~"$port", shard="$shard", role=~"$role", database=~"$database", user=~"$user"}) by (host, port, shard, role, database, user)

panels.title: Servers Idle In Transaction

panels.description: How long clients have been waiting for a connection.

targets.expr: max (pgdog_maxwait{host=~"$host", port=~"$port", shard="$shard", role=~"$role", database=~"$database", user=~"$user"}) by (host, port, shard, role, database, user)

panels.title: Connection Max Wait Time

panels.description: Errors that connections in the pool have experienced.

targets.expr: sum (rate(pgdog_errors{host=~"$host", port=~"$port", shard="$shard", role=~"$role", database=~"$database", user=~"$user"}[$__rate_interval])) by (host, port, shard, role, database, user)

panels.title: Connection Errors Rate

panels.description: Connections that have been returned to the pool in a broken state.

targets.expr: sum (rate(pgdog_out_of_sync{host=~"$host", port=~"$port", shard="$shard", role=~"$role", database=~"$database", user=~"$user"}[$__rate_interval])) by (host, port, shard, role, database, user)

panels.title: Connection Out Of Sync Rate

panels.description: Total number of executed transactions.

targets.expr: sum (rate(pgdog_total_xact_count{host=~"$host", port=~"$port", shard="$shard", role=~"$role", database=~"$database", user=~"$user"}[$__rate_interval])) by (host, port, shard, role, database, user)

panels.title: Transactions Rate

panels.description: Total number of executed two-phase commit transactions.

targets.expr: sum (rate(pgdog_total_xact_2pc_count{host=~"$host", port=~"$port", shard="$shard", role=~"$role", database=~"$database", user=~"$user"}[$__rate_interval])) by (host, port, shard, role, database, user)

panels.title: Two-Phase Commit Transactions Rate

panels.description: Total time spent executing transactions.

targets.expr: avg (rate(pgdog_total_xact_time{host=~"$host", port=~"$port", shard="$shard", role=~"$role", database=~"$database", user=~"$user"}[$__rate_interval])) by (host, port, shard, role, database, user)

panels.title: Transactions Executing Time Rate

panels.description: Average number of executed transactions per statistics period.

targets.expr: sum (pgdog_avg_xact_count{host=~"$host", port=~"$port", shard="$shard", role=~"$role", database=~"$database", user=~"$user"}) by (host, port, shard, role, database, user)

panels.title: Average Transactions Count

panels.description: Average number of executed two-phase commit transactions per statistics period.

targets.expr: sum (pgdog_avg_xact_2pc_count{host=~"$host", port=~"$port", shard="$shard", role=~"$role", database=~"$database", user=~"$user"}) by (host, port, shard, role, database, user)

panels.title: Average Two-Phase Commit Transactions Count

panels.description: Average time spent executing transactions.

targets.expr: avg (pgdog_avg_xact_time{host=~"$host", port=~"$port", shard="$shard", role=~"$role", database=~"$database", user=~"$user"}) by (host, port, shard, role, database, user)

panels.title: Average Time Spent Executing Transactions

panels.description: Total number of executed queries.

targets.expr: sum (rate(pgdog_total_query_count{host=~"$host", port=~"$port", shard="$shard", role=~"$role", database=~"$database", user=~"$user"}[$__rate_interval])) by (host, port, shard, role, database, user)

panels.title: Query Rate

panels.description: Total time spent executing queries.

targets.expr: avg (rate(pgdog_total_query_time{host=~"$host", port=~"$port", shard="$shard", role=~"$role", database=~"$database", user=~"$user"}[$__rate_interval])) by (host, port, shard, role, database, user)

panels.title: Query Executing Time Rate

panels.description: Average number of executed queries per statistics period.

targets.expr: sum (pgdog_avg_query_count{host=~"$host", port=~"$port", shard="$shard", role=~"$role", database=~"$database", user=~"$user"}) by (host, port, shard, role, database, user)

panels.title: Average Query Count

panels.description: Average time spent executing queries.

targets.expr: avg (pgdog_avg_query_time{host=~"$host", port=~"$port", shard="$shard", role=~"$role", database=~"$database", user=~"$user"}) by (host, port, shard, role, database, user)

panels.title: Average Query Executing Time

panels.description: Number of queries in the cache.

targets.expr: sum (pgdog_query_cache_size) by (instance)

panels.title: Query Cache Size

panels.description:
HIT - Queries already present in the query cache.

MISS - New queries added to the query cache.

DIRECT - Queries sent directly to a single shard.

CROSS - Queries sent to multiple or all shards.

targets.expr: sum (rate(pgdog_query_cache_hits[$__rate_interval])) by (instance)
sum (rate(pgdog_query_cache_misses[$__rate_interval])) by (instance)
sum (rate(pgdog_query_cache_direct[$__rate_interval])) by (instance)
sum (rate(pgdog_query_cache_cross[$__rate_interval])) by (instance)

panels.title: Query Cache Rate

panels.description: Total number of bytes received.

targets.expr: sum (rate(pgdog_total_received{host=~"$host", port=~"$port", shard="$shard", role=~"$role", database=~"$database", user=~"$user"}[$__rate_interval])) by (host, port, shard, role, database, user)

panels.title: Traffic Received Rate

panels.description: Total number of bytes sent.

targets.expr: sum (rate(pgdog_total_sent{host=~"$host", port=~"$port", shard="$shard", role=~"$role", database=~"$database", user=~"$user"}[$__rate_interval])) by (host, port, shard, role, database, user)

panels.title: Traffic Sent Rate

panels.description: Average number of bytes received.

targets.expr: sum (pgdog_avg_received{host=~"$host", port=~"$port", shard="$shard", role=~"$role", database=~"$database", user=~"$user"}) by (host, port, shard, role, database, user)

panels.title: Average Traffic Received

panels.description: Average number of bytes sent.

targets.expr: sum (pgdog_avg_sent{host=~"$host", port=~"$port", shard="$shard", role=~"$role", database=~"$database", user=~"$user"}) by (host, port, shard, role, database, user)

panels.title: Average Traffic Sent

panels.description: Number of bytes used for the prepared statements cache.

targets.expr: sum (pgdog_prepared_statements_memory_used) by (instance)

panels.title: Prepared Statements Memory Used

panels.description: Total number of prepared statements closed because of cache evictions.

targets.expr: sum (rate(pgdog_total_prepared_evictions{host=~"$host", port=~"$port", shard="$shard", role=~"$role", database=~"$database", user=~"$user"}[$__rate_interval])) by (host, port, shard, role, database, user)

panels.title: Prepared Statements Eviction Rate

panels.description: Number of prepared statements in the cache.

targets.expr: sum (pgdog_prepared_statements) by (instance)

panels.title: Prepared Statements Count

panels.description: Average number of prepared statements closed because of cache evictions.

targets.expr: sum (pgdog_avg_prepared_evictions{host=~"$host", port=~"$port", shard="$shard", role=~"$role", database=~"$database", user=~"$user"}) by (host, port, shard, role, database, user)

panels.title: Average Prepared Statements Eviction Count

panels.description:
TOTAL - Total number of requests considered for mirroring.

MIRRORED - Total number of requests successfully mirrored.

DROPPED - Total number of requests dropped due to exposure settings.

ERROR - Total number of mirror requests that encountered errors.

targets.expr: sum (rate(pgdog_mirror_total_count{database=~"$database", user=~"$user"}[$__rate_interval])) by (instance, database, user)
sum (rate(pgdog_mirror_mirrored_count{database=~"$database", user=~"$user"}[$__rate_interval])) by (instance, database, user)
sum (rate(pgdog_mirror_dropped_count{database=~"$database", user=~"$user"}[$__rate_interval])) by (instance, database, user)
sum (rate(pgdog_mirror_error_count{database=~"$database", user=~"$user"}[$__rate_interval])) by (instance, database, user)

panels.title: Mirror Rate

panels.description: Current number of transactions in the mirror queue.

targets.expr: sum (pgdog_mirror_queue_length{database=~"$database", user=~"$user"}) by (instance, database, user)

panels.title: Mirror Queue Size

title: PGDog
